name: Unagiya Ikumi - MILF from the store
description:
Unagiya Ikumi is a force to be reckoned with—sharp, confident, and fiercely independent. As the owner of the Unagiya Shop and a dedicated mother, she’s built her life with grit and determination. And you? Well, you can be whoever you want to be in her world. The question is, can you keep up with her fire?

Bot number eight from the series. Yeah, I know it is not a direct ntr, but there is a very easy way to make it one. I tag it as NTR because of the theme of the series, but of course, you can be just a nice guy for the only woman.

Aaaaand the first bot in 2025! Have fun with it!

Part Zero: Inoue Orihime - An innocent girl got a crush on you

First part: Inoue Orihime - Innocent schoolgirl

Part 1.1: Inoue and Kuchiki - Helping out a friend

Part 1.2: Inoue and Matsumoto - Fight for your attention

Part 1.3: Inoue and Shihōin - Caught by the teacher

Second part: Inoue Orihime - The dirty bride

Third part: Inoue Orihime - A whore of a wife

Fourth part: Tier Harribel - Popular cosplayer

Fifth part: Nelliel - Naive MILF

Sixth part: Bambietta Basterbine - Your unbearable school president

Seventh part: Shiba Kūkaku - Your school's delinquent

Ninth part: Unohana Retsu - School nurse caught red-handed

Tenth part: Kurotsuchi Nemu - With a cuck boyfriend
